title: Pi.dev: Your Own Agent Harness
topic: pi.dev — the reshapeable open-source AI agent harness (earendil-works Pi) — and the business & product opportunities it unlocks across domains
summary: A domain-opportunist's field notes on Pi, the open-source agent harness you reshape around your own workflow — four tools, an agent loop, TypeScript extensions and BYOK — and the wildly different products it makes buildable across finance, healthcare, law, industry, and the studio, plus where the liability lives.

concepts.title: Finance: Desks, Reconciliation & the BYOK Data Room
Healthcare: PHI That Never Leaves the Building
Law & Professional Services: A Harness With Memory
Industry & the Edge: SSH, RPC and the Machine Floor
Shipping a Vertical: Packages, SDK & the Moat
Trust & Guardrails: Where the Liability Lives

images.prompt: A refined editorial illustration, flat-vector with fine linework, on a warm off-white background: a small, spare central harness of four hand tools (read, write, edit, and a wrench) sitting on a workbench, with faint blueprint lines radiating outward to reshape it into five different specialized machines — a trading desk terminal, a hospital cart, a legal ledger, an industrial robot arm, and a film camera. Single rust-orange accent (#b0451d) against ink and paper, generous whitespace, confident and precise, no text baked in. Target size ~1280×720px, 16:9 landscape; the art is letterboxed into a 16:9 box, so keep the central harness centred with safe margins.
images.alt: A bare metal harness of hand-tools being reshaped by an engineer into many different specialized machines
images.caption: One small harness, reshaped into a different machine for every domain.

images.prompt: A refined flat-vector editorial illustration on a warm off-white background: a trading-desk analyst at a multi-monitor terminal, with a translucent vault boundary drawn around the desk labelled by a lock glyph, and a small agent icon working strictly inside the boundary — market-data and ledger streams flow in, but a bright rust-orange line marks where client data cannot cross outward. Single rust accent (#b0451d) over ink and paper, clean geometry, calm and precise, generous whitespace, no text baked in. Target size ~1280×720px, 16:9 landscape; the art is letterboxed into a 16:9 box, so keep the desk and vault centred with safe margins.
images.alt: A secured data room: a trading desk analyst working with an agent while client data stays behind a locked vault boundary
images.caption: The BYOK data room: the agent works inside the vault; the data never ships out.

images.prompt: A clean flat-vector editorial illustration on a warm off-white background: a cross-section of a hospital building with a small sealed container box inside it holding an agent icon; patient-record cards circulate strictly within the building's walls while a rust-orange boundary line marks the perimeter they never cross; a faint outbound arrow to a cloud model carries only an anonymized token, not records. Single rust accent (#b0451d) over ink and paper, calm and precise, generous whitespace, no text baked in. Target size ~1280×720px, 16:9 landscape; the art is letterboxed into a 16:9 box, so keep the hospital centred with safe margins.
images.alt: A hospital building with an agent running inside a sealed on-prem container, patient records staying within the walls
images.caption: On-prem + BYOK: the agent runs inside the walls; PHI stays inside them too.

images.prompt: A playful but refined flat-vector editorial illustration on a warm off-white background: a small agent "conductor" icon at the centre of a media production pipeline, waving cue lines to a row of creative tools — a paintbrush, a 3D cube, an audio waveform, a video clapperboard — whose outputs stream rightward into a stack of render-farm servers. A single rust-orange accent (#b0451d) threads the pipeline together against ink and paper; clean geometry, generous whitespace, energetic but tidy, no text baked in. Target size ~1280×720px, 16:9 landscape; the art is letterboxed into a 16:9 box, so keep the conductor and pipeline centred with safe margins.
images.alt: A creative studio pipeline: an agent conductor coordinating asset-generation tools feeding a render farm
images.caption: The harness as conductor: it runs the pipeline; the humans keep the taste.
